Active CandidatesSalaries owned by me

Workflow.Name: MSCandidatesAgent-InsertData to Datavers
Workflow.Description: This flow starts when it receives a manual trigger with a JSON input containing candidate details. It processes the input to extract information for each candidate, such as name, email, education, experience, skills, and certifications. For every candidate in the input, it creates a new record in a data table with the extracted details. After all records are added, the flow sends a response to confirm completion. The flow ensures each candidate’s information is handled individually and efficiently, supporting bulk data processing in a structured and automated way.

Description.description: This flow starts when it receives a manual trigger with a JSON input containing candidate details. It processes the input to extract information for each candidate, such as name, email, education, experience, skills, and certifications. For every candidate in the input, it creates a new record in a data table with the extracted details. After all records are added, the flow sends a response to confirm completion. The flow ensures each candidate’s information is handled individually and efficiently, supporting bulk data processing in a structured and automated way.

Workflow.Name: MSCandidatesRecommendationAgent-Search Candidate based on Skills
Workflow.Description: This flow starts when a manual trigger receives a text input. It initializes two arrays, then queries a data source for candidate records matching the input. The results are processed, and for each candidate, their availability is retrieved from another data source. The flow compiles the candidate profiles and their availability, then sends this information back as a response. The sequence of actions is controlled by success conditions, ensuring each step only runs after the previous one completes successfully.

Description.description: This flow starts when a manual trigger receives a text input. It initializes two arrays, then queries a data source for candidate records matching the input. The results are processed, and for each candidate, their availability is retrieved from another data source. The flow compiles the candidate profiles and their availability, then sends this information back as a response. The sequence of actions is controlled by success conditions, ensuring each step only runs after the previous one completes successfully.

Workflow.Name: MSFinanceAgent-Dsiplay the price for Candidates
Workflow.Description: This flow starts when it receives a manual trigger with two text inputs. It then searches a data source for records where the email contains either of the provided inputs. The flow extracts specific fields related to salary and daily cost from the matching records. Finally, it returns the extracted information as a response to the original request.

Description.description: This flow starts when it receives a manual trigger with two text inputs. It then searches a data source for records where the email contains either of the provided inputs. The flow extracts specific fields related to salary and daily cost from the matching records. Finally, it returns the extracted information as a response to the original request.
